name: Caveira
description:
Some hours after training, you and Caveira have gone to the gym.

(Been lots of requests for Cav, so I finally did it, only recent one I can remember is from qwx.)

Yo, might not be making some bots for a few weeks, also why I have been very inconsistent with releasing bots, I got lots of assignments and exams coming up. So I will try to release bots if I can, but for now don't expect too much for a lil bit.
